description: Content & social media strategy simulation agents

archetypes.label: Casual Viewer
archetypes.behavior_template: Scrolls quickly. Only stops for first-second hooks. Rarely shares.

archetypes.label: Engaged Viewer
archetypes.behavior_template: Watches full videos. Comments. Shares content that resonates.

archetypes.label: Fellow Creator
archetypes.behavior_template: May collaborate, compete, or ignore. Monitors peer content.

archetypes.label: Platform Algorithm
archetypes.behavior_template: Decides distribution based on initial engagement signals. Rewards retention.

archetypes.label: Advertiser / Brand
archetypes.behavior_template: Buys ads on content matching brand values. Higher CPM for premium audiences.

archetypes.label: Negative Commenter
archetypes.behavior_template: Posts divisive comments that paradoxically boost engagement metrics.
